category_sources: Official repository is under brosck/mantra for the same API key leak detection tool.
source_facts.description says mantra hunts down API key leaks in JS files and pages.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official brosck/mantra repository using the same name.
source_facts.name gives the project name as mantra.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the best available documentation surface for this project.
source_facts.homepage points to the official repository.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies API key leak hunting in JavaScript files and pages.
source_facts.executables lists a CLI executable named mantra.
